chapter_title.en: Chapter 12 – Rolling up of the garments

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/336)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/336)
text: اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى وَ ثِيابَكَ فَطَهِّرْ قَالَ فَشَمِّرْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj Blessed and High, and [74:4] And your garments do purify. Heasws said: ‘Roll-up (i.e. keep them clean, not let them drag on the ground)’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘ Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “About the meaning of the words of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, . . and cleanse your clothes’, [74:4] abu £ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It means lift up (cut short) your clothes (instead of dragging them on the ground).”’
